company_type: Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) - Open-Air Shopping Centers

supply_chain.dependencies: Dependent on construction materials (steel, lumber) and labor for redevelopment projects; supply chain disruptions and inflation impact construction costs and timelines
risks: Tenant bankruptcy risk, lease termination risk, property market conditions, interest rate fluctuations affecting property values

Supply chain disruptions due to global factors; increased costs for materials and labor; labor shortages; delays in completing renovation projects or tenant buildouts; international trade disputes and tariffs on imported materials (steel, lumber)

regulatory_risks: Federal income tax at regular corporate rates if less than 100% of net taxable income is distributed
Increasing levels of regulation and disclosure requirements related to corporate responsibility and climate matters
United States Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (for past international operations)
Taxable REIT subsidiary (TRS) federal and state income tax obligations
California's climate disclosure rules
Securities regulations and NYSE listing standards
Environmental compliance requirements
State and local zoning, usage and other regulations relating to real property
Federal income tax regulations and annual distribution requirements (90% of REIT taxable income)
Federal income and excise taxes on undistributed taxable income
Stock exchange requirements (NYSE)
Environmental laws, ordinances and regulations regarding hazardous or toxic substances
Changes in governmental laws and regulations including data privacy, environmental (climate change), safety and health laws
State and local tax compliance on income and property
Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) compliance requirements and potential future changes
Annual distribution requirement of at least 90% of net taxable income to maintain REIT status
Insider trading policy compliance requirements
Federal securities laws and regulations
REIT qualification requirements under Internal Revenue Code
Real estate zoning and land use regulations
REIT qualification requirements under Internal Revenue Code Sections 856-860
Conflicting state laws regarding corporate responsibility matters (some requiring climate disclosures, others constraining such considerations)

sanction_risks: Trade disputes could result in inflationary pressures impacting construction material costs
International trade disputes including U.S. trade tariffs and retaliatory tariffs could adversely impact tenant operations
Tariffs or trade restrictions could materially increase costs for tenants selling imported goods
